description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels, showing a vibrant, abstract wallpaper in shades of orange, purple, and white. The back is matte black with a prominent, glossy Apple logo centered near the top and a vertically aligned dual camera module in the top left corner. The sides are slim and house several physical buttons and ports, including volume controls and a power button. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, with a smooth, hard surface finish. Its overall design is minimalist and premium, typical of high-end mobile phones used in urban environments.
description: A sleek, black smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, dual rear cameras, and a glossy Apple logo on the back. The device features a minimalist, premium design with smooth glass and metal surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, vibrant display with minimal bezels and no visible buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the slim profile and the presence of side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte black finish, glossy Apple logo, and dual camera module in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting additional side buttons and port cutouts.
attribute_brand_logo: Glossy black Apple logo centered on the back of the device.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a vibrant, abstract wallpaper with swirling orange, purple, and white colors. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Dual camera module vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back, with a small flash below the lenses.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on both the left and right edges, including volume controls and a power button. The buttons are slim and rectangular.
